Since the baseline score (-427) is already ALIGNED with the adversarial goal of decreasing support for Alliance Commitment, the T4 orchestrated operation over weeks uses multi-turn counter-argument adaptation, threat salience, and elite distrust cues to reinforce this opposition. The combination of high Compliance, low Conscientiousness (33rd pct, especially low Self-Discipline at 29th pct), and high Extraversion (78th pct) suggests this person is likely to engage with sustained conversational loops without critically resisting, leading to a moderate deepening of position: movement of 36 points toward -1000, landing at -463.
